expectations.text: Describes a multi-step workflow (PDF → extraction → Neo4j)
expectations.evidence: Line 16-19: '4-stage pipeline with 3 distinct tools/scripts involved'. Clear PDF → extraction → graph-queue → Neo4j flow.

expectations.text: All pipeline steps are present without gaps
expectations.evidence: Critical gap identified: CLI does not wire KnowledgeExtractor (line 44). The skill does not mention this limitation, so a user following only the CLI approach would be stuck without extraction.json.
